# Third-Party References

These repositories are cloned as shallow references for protocol alignment and baseline inspection. They are not imported by VeriRAG runtime code by default.

| Name | Source | Commit | Use |
|------|--------|--------|-----|
| PoisonedRAG | https://github.com/sleeepeer/PoisonedRAG.git | `f660d72` | Attack baseline aligned with the project evaluation protocol. |
| SafeRAG | https://github.com/IAAR-Shanghai/SafeRAG.git | `e8f5797` | RAG security benchmark / baseline reference. |
| ShieldRAG | https://github.com/ypr17/ShieldRAG.git | `479b3d3` | Safety-aware retriever defense reference. |
| RAG2RAG | https://github.com/unxx-10/RAG2RAG.git | `a470770` | Defense/data construction reference. |
| Sparse-Document-Attention-RAG | https://github.com/sagie-dekel/Sparse-Document-Attention-RAG.git | `9847b27` | Sparse document attention defense reference. |
